title: Café Loki
setting: A small café near Hallgrímskirkja, Reykjavík. 11:30. You order traditional Icelandic food and chat with the server.

npc.name: Sigurður
npc.personality: friendly café server, proud of Icelandic cuisine. Happy to explain dishes.
npc.initialLine: Velkomin! Hvað get ég boðið þér?
npc.initialTranslation: Welcome! What can I offer you?

debriefRu: Þú ert á kaffihús nálægt Hallgrímskirkju í Reykjavík. Þú pantar íslenskan mat og spjallar við þjóninn.
debriefEn: You are at a café near Hallgrímskirkja in Reykjavík. You order Icelandic food and chat with the server.

turns.instruction: Greet the server and ask what they recommend from the menu.

prompt.ru: Góðan dag. Hvað mælirðu með á matseðlinum?
prompt.phonetic: GOH-than day. Kvath MIGH-lir-thu meth ow MAT-seth-li-num?
prompt.en: Good day. What do you recommend on the menu?

turns.instruction: Ask what soup is available today.
Order the lamb soup and a coffee.

prompt.ru: Ég ætla að fá kjötsúpu og kaffi, takk.
prompt.phonetic: Yeg AY-tla ath fow KYOT-soo-pu ok KAF-fi, tahk.
prompt.en: I'd like to have lamb soup and coffee, thanks.

turns.instruction: Ask if the bread is homemade.
Ask for the bill and compliment the food.

prompt.en: The bill, please. The food was excellent!
